programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programmes.show_name: The Heritage Chart with Mike Read
programmes.show_description: Another episode of the Heritage Chart - new music by heritage acts! With Mike Read.

programmes.show_name: Mark Goodier's 12 inch 80s!
programmes.show_description: Dancefloor action with 20 extended mixes and king-size videos of '80s classics. From Aztec Camera and A-Ha to Queen, Visage and Whitney Houston. Mark Goodier is on the ones and twos!

programmes.show_name: Kylie vs Jason: Neighbours!
programmes.show_description: '80s sweethearts on and off screen - we bring you an hour of Kylie and Jason, followed by the song that saw them walk down the aisle from Angry Anderson.

programmes.show_name: Andy Crane Broom Cupboard Bangers!
programmes.show_description: Strap yourself in as Andy takes you back to late 80s teatime on BBC1 - Blue Peter, Grange Hill & Neighbours - plus 30 of the very best feel-good chart bangers from that era!

programmes.show_name: 101 Feelgood Anthems of the 80s!
programmes.show_description: Robin Banks with a mammoth singalong session of '80s anthems guaranteed to put you in the mood. From Belinda and Bananarama to Whitney and Wham! - a full-on decade of top tunes!

programmes.show_name: Air Guitar Anthems! 1980-1989
programmes.show_description: Dust down your air guitar, because we've 40 rock anthems from the '80s to strum along to! From AC/DC in 1980 to GN'R in 1989, via U2, Kiss, Toto, Springsteen and ZZ Top.

programmes.show_name: Jenny Powell: Such A Good Feeling!
programmes.show_description: Dancing through history - one anthem at a time! From late 80s optimism to mid 90s euphoria, it's where house, rave and eurodance all started. Hands in the air people!

programmes.show_name: 80s Dancefloor with Jeff Young!
programmes.show_description: Funk, soul, Hi-NRG, new jack swing and house took dance in all sorts of new directions during the '80s, and Radio 1's Friday night 'Big Beat' DJ Jeff Young was there!

programmes.show_name: Nutty Boys! Madness '80-'86
programmes.show_description: Fourteen quickfire songs from the Nutty Boys of Camden Town - Madness! Including Baggy Trousers, Michael Caine and Wings of a Dove.

programmes.show_name: Pat Sharp's 30 Silly Songs!
programmes.show_description: The decade where George Michael rapped, Sheena Easton shovelled coal and Harry Enfield became a musical genius! They're all here, along with Captain Kirk and some singing frogs.

programmes.show_name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun! 1980-89
programmes.show_description: NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi and Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama and Kylie, it's wall-to-wall singalongs and unapologetic 80s fabulousness!

programmes.show_name: Eurovision: The Highs & Lows!
programmes.show_description: Duncan James and his band Blue represented the UK in 2011 - coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners and losers over 50 years - here are 2 hours of highs - and lows!

programmes.show_name: Strictly Dance Crazes of the 80s!
programmes.show_description: Every so often a video came along that set new high (and low) standards of dance, or kicked off an often short-lived new dance craze! Here's the '80s - dance by dance.

programmes.show_name: Bruno's Rebels & Rule Breakers!
programmes.show_description: Bruno Brookes has stories galore from 20 of rock and pop's real game changers. Icons, rebels, activists and a few of the more unexpected heroes who reshaped music and the media.

programmes.show_name: Every Song From NOW 2 - 1984
programmes.show_description: NOW 2 was that 'difficult second album'! We wonder how the series did following it? Here are all 30 videos in track list order from March 1984.
